issues.description: TrashFromHand is not a valid action type for this effect. The card should use a conditional structure to trash from hand, then apply Rest with proper duration.

Rest action is missing duration constraint. Card text states 'cannot attack until the end of your opponent's next turn' which requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn' (or equivalent constraint), not a simple Rest.
Second effect with trigger:'Trigger' is invalid. The card has a single [On Play] effect with a conditional (You may trash). There should not be a separate Trigger effect.

Card text says 'Up to 1 of your opponent's rested Leader' — effect should only target an already-rested opponent Leader, not rest one. The condition should check LeaderIsRested or similar, not unconditionally Rest.

Duration 'until the end of your opponent's next turn' indicates a timed lockdown, not a permanent Rest. This requires proper duration modeling (DuringOpponentTurn or similar) to prevent the opponent from attacking that turn.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Up to 1 of your opponent's rested Leader cannot attack until the end of your opponent's next turn.
